name: Green tahini sauce

ingredients.item: flat-leaf parsley leaves, finely chopped if making by hand
ingredients.original: ½ cup / 30 g flat-leaf parsley leaves, finely chopped if making by hand

method: In a bowl, thoroughly whisk together the tahini, water, lemon juice, garlic, and salt. The mixture should be creamy and smooth. If it is too thick, add more water. Stir in the chopped parsley, then taste and add more salt if needed.

If using a food processor or a blender, process together all the ingredients except the parsley until smooth. Add more water if needed. Add the parsley and turn the machine on again for a second or two. Taste for seasoning.
